basic_info.short_form: Shaheed Sukhdev College of Business Studies

address.address: PSP Area IV, Dr. K.N. Katju Marg, Sector 16, Rohini India
address.map_location: Shaheed Sukhdev College of Business Studies (CBS)

pos_sentences.text: Society culture is fantastic , you can get exposure to any domain you want through societies.
pos_sentences.name: Anonymous

pos_sentences.text: hackCBS , event organised by kronos the tech society of SSCBS.
pos_sentences.name: Anonymous

pos_sentences.text: Experienced faculties and practical approach in learning.
pos_sentences.name: Chetan

pos_sentences.text: There is a healthy competition on campus.
pos_sentences.name: Chetan

pos_sentences.text: When it comes to the exposure, again we have one of the best companies coming at our campus for recruitments
pos_sentences.name: Piyush Payla

pos_sentences.text: Fee Structure of SSCBS is very feasible and can be easily afforded by a student coming from a middle class family
pos_sentences.name: Rashid Umar Khan

pos_sentences.text: Focus on Academics by the faculty and college is very good .
pos_sentences.name: Rashid Umar Khan

pos_sentences.text: Good Infra facility and huge amd great library
pos_sentences.name: Arvind Ranjan

pos_sentences.text: Exposure, the college provides a decent and a good exposure to your skills and knowledge
pos_sentences.name: Tushar vish

pos_sentences.text: Curriculum of the BBA AND BMS course is quite nice.
pos_sentences.name: Vansh

neg_sentences.text: Societies culture can be toxic sometimes
neg_sentences.name: Akshansh Srivastava

neg_sentences.text: Students here are usually very busy trying to incorporate the corporate company environment
neg_sentences.name: Akshansh Srivastava

neg_sentences.text: The social life in this college is not what one can get here.
neg_sentences.name: Vansh

neg_sentences.text: good internship opportunities are very less
neg_sentences.name: shachi

neg_sentences.text: Lack of heterogeneity in student demographics
neg_sentences.name: Kavin Krishnan

neg_sentences.text: Placement for Computer Science is almost nill.
neg_sentences.name: Anonymous

neg_sentences.text: Some classes of theory subject were boring.
neg_sentences.name: Chetan

neg_sentences.text: You will mostly find that the most of the students have the business oriented mind and their always they are not thinking of the summer the alternatives in their life
neg_sentences.name: VIVEK SINGH YADAV

neg_sentences.text: Most of the student suggest following of the academic and even there is a very less opportunity that you will get in tech role interview or job
neg_sentences.name: VIVEK SINGH YADAV

courses.course: Bachelor of Business Administration [BBA] (Financial Investment Analysis)
Post Graduate Diploma in Cyber Security
